message.content:
@startuml
actor Operator
participant <<Boundary>> MakerUI
participant <<Control>> Maker
participant <<Entity>> Request
participant <<Entity>> Passport

Operator -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 1: Login
<<Boundary>> MakerUI -> <<Control>> Maker : 1.2: Pass Credentials
<<Control>> Maker -> <<Entity>> Request : 1.2.1: Evaluate
<<Entity>> Request -> <<Control>> Maker : 1.2.2.1: getRequest()
<<Control>> Maker -> <<Entity>> Request : 1.2.2.2: Got requests
<<Control>> Maker -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 1.3: Return requests
<<Boundary>> MakerUI -> Operator : 2: Render requests
Operator -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 2: Print "Invalid login"

loop [n times]
    alt [do Print Passport]
        Operator -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 3: Print passport
        <<Boundary>> MakerUI -> <<Control>> Maker : 3.1: Print passport
        <<Control>> Maker -> <<Entity>> Request : ref: Print passport
        <<Entity>> Request -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : Printer State
        <<Boundary>> MakerUI -> Operator : Printed
    end
    alt [do Edit Passport]
        Operator -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 3: Edit Passport
        <<Boundary>> MakerUI -> <<Control>> Maker : 3.1: Get passport data
        <<Control>> Maker -> <<Entity>> Request : 3.1.1: getPassport()
        <<Entity>> Request -> <<Control>> Maker : 3.1.2: Passport
        <<Control>> Maker -> <<Boundary>> MakerUI : 3.2: Edit Passport
        <<Boundary>> MakerUI -> Operator : 4: Password edited
    end
@enduml
